div1.entryFree: Scribe, one writing, one penning down something: that my master, being s., to himself should write the letter, Gent. II, 1, 146. if thy stumps will let thee play the s. Tit. II, 4, 4. hearts, tongues, figures, --s, bards, poets, cannot think, speak, cast, write, sing, number his love to Antony, Ant. III, 2, 16.
